calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-04-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Nov-12-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Arlene Howell, #2514.

Eric Shiu, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Salesforce.com, Inc.
Betty Levitin, Bad Debt Analyst for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Global ERP & RFID, Inc.
Default was entered against defendant on August 17, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on September 22, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Salesforce.com, Inc., and against the Defaulted Defendant Global ERP & RFID, Inc. as follows:

Damages/Principal - $29,633.63.
Prejudgment Interest - $3,312.97.
Attorney Fees - $1,000.00.
Costs - $640.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $34,586.60.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-11-2009 Continued To Dec-18-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
